categories.name: Security Posture
categories.description: No critical vulns, clean dependency audit, no hardcoded secrets, appropriate permission scope

categories.name: Functionality
categories.description: Does what we need, handles edge cases, reliable output

categories.name: Integration Effort
categories.description: How hard to wire into our stack. Config complexity, dependency conflicts, breaking changes

categories.name: Maintenance Health
categories.description: Recent commits, responsive maintainers, active community, good issue triage

categories.name: Documentation Quality
categories.description: Clear README, API docs, examples, changelog

categories.name: License Compatibility
categories.description: Compatible with our use case, no viral copyleft that blocks our model

decisions.full_adopt: Integrate as-is. Proceed to documentation and fork.
decisions.partial_adopt: Extract useful parts. Build our own wrapper using their approach.
decisions.soft_reject: Not worth integrating. Document learnings for future reference.
decisions.hard_reject: Fundamentally unsuitable. Archive findings and move on.

provenance_modifiers._comment: Applied to security score before weighting. Does not add new categories.
